name: Pie Crust (Snow Cream Filling)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour and salt.
2. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles cornmeal.
3. Add water slowly until mixture forms small, crumbled crumbs.
4. Form the mixture into a ball.
5. Roll out to a thickness of about 1/8".
6. Place in pie pan and poke holes in the bottom with a fork.
7. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
8. Note: Fill with snow cream filling or your favorite filling. Snow Cream Filling: Mix together 1 small box instant pudding, 1 cup milk, and 8 oz sour cream. Process at slow speed for 1 minute. Place in baked pie shell.
